name: Shea Butter Soap
description: Raw, unrefined shea butter melted into a cold-pressed base and poured by hand. Shea is one of the few butters that conditions while it cleanses, which is why this bar suits dry and sensitive skin that finds ordinary soap stripping. Choose rose, bright lemon, or detoxifying charcoal.
ingredients: Saponified coconut & olive oils, raw shea butter, glycerin, essential oil of the chosen variant, vitamin E.

name: Goat Milk Soap
description: Fresh goat milk makes a bar unusually creamy — it feeds the skin rather than stripping it. Naturally rich in lactic acid, it gently smooths and brightens over time. Our most-loved everyday soap, in four honest scents.
ingredients: Fresh goat milk, saponified coconut & olive oils, glycerin, natural fragrance of the chosen variant, vitamin E.

name: Botanical Soap
description: Our apothecary range — single-botanical bars built around one hard-working ingredient each. Kasturi manjal and papaya to brighten, neem to calm breakouts, multani mitti to lift oil, sandalwood and aloe to soothe. Pick the one your skin is asking for.
ingredients: Saponified coconut & olive oils, glycerin, and the named botanical — papaya & wild turmeric, rose & lavender, aloe vera, sandalwood, activated charcoal, neem, or fuller's earth.

name: Scrub Soap
description: A bar and a scrub in one. Colloidal oats, ubtan grains or coffee granules are suspended right through the soap, so you exfoliate as you wash — no separate step, no scratchy over-scrubbing. Two or three times a week is plenty.
ingredients: Saponified coconut & olive oils, glycerin, plus colloidal oatmeal & honey, gram flour & turmeric, or coffee granules depending on the variant.

name: Clay Soap
description: Mineral clays draw oil and city grime out of congested skin without the tightness that comes from harsh surfactants. Green French clay for oily and acne-prone skin, pink rose clay for normal, kaolin for sensitive.
ingredients: Saponified coconut & olive oils, glycerin, French green clay, pink rose clay or kaolin clay, essential oils.

name: Signature Soap
description: The two bars we make with our most precious ingredients. Mysore sandalwood ground with cinnamon for a warm, gently exfoliating bar; and goat milk with real saffron strands folded through — the one we make for gifting.
ingredients: Saponified coconut & olive oils, glycerin, sandalwood powder & cinnamon, or goat milk & saffron strands, vitamin E.

name: Flower Soap
description: Our prettiest bars — real petals set into clear glycerin, poured one at a time. They lather soft and rosy, and they look like something on a dressing table rather than a bathroom shelf. The gift people quietly keep for themselves.
ingredients: Glycerin soap base, rose absolute, dried rose petals and assorted dried flowers, sweet almond oil.

name: Toy Soap
description: A little toy set inside a mild, tear-free glycerin bar — the trick that turns bath time from a negotiation into a treat. Kids wash until they can reach the toy. Gentle enough for the youngest skin, and no harsh chemicals.
ingredients: Glycerin soap base, mild plant-derived surfactants, food-grade colour, light natural fragrance. Contains a small toy — adult supervision advised.

name: Body Wash
description: Sulphate-free from the first batch — no SLS, no SLES, so it lathers kindly and rinses clean without leaving skin squeaky and tight. Thirteen scents, from bracing Ocean Mist to Divine Lotus with jojoba beads.
ingredients: Aqua, mild plant-derived (sulphate-free) surfactants, glycerin, aloe vera, natural fragrance of the chosen variant, vitamin E. 200 ml.

name: Body Lotion
description: A daily lotion with enough butter in it to actually last the day, but light enough to dress over five minutes later. Our full 250g jar — the one that lives by the bed rather than in the travel bag.
ingredients: Aqua, shea & kokum butters, cold-pressed sweet almond oil, glycerin, aloe vera, natural fragrance of the chosen variant, vitamin E. 250 gms.

name: Body Lotion
description: The same whipped butter-and-almond-oil lotion in a 100g jar — the right size to try a new scent, keep in a handbag, or gift alongside a bar of soap.
ingredients: Aqua, shea & kokum butters, cold-pressed sweet almond oil, glycerin, aloe vera, natural fragrance of the chosen variant, vitamin E. 100 gms.

name: Dark Rose Body Scrub
description: Fine sugar and crushed dark rose petals in a nourishing oil base. It polishes away rough patches on knees, elbows and shoulders and leaves behind enough oil that you can skip lotion afterwards. Deeply, unapologetically rose.
ingredients: Cane sugar, dried dark rose petals, cold-pressed coconut & sweet almond oils, rose absolute, vitamin E. 100 gms.

name: Face Wash
description: Amino-acid based, which is the gentlest cleansing chemistry there is — SLS-free, SLES-free, paraben-free and silicone-free. It lifts oil and sunscreen without that stripped, squeaky feeling. Neem tulsi for breakouts, ubtan to brighten, coffee to wake up, rose and rose clay for calm, orange and strawberry for dullness.
ingredients: Aqua, amino acid surfactants, glycerin, aloe vera, panthenol, botanical extract of the chosen variant, vitamin E. Free from SLS, SLES, parabens and silicones. 100 ml.

name: Face Cream
description: A light, breathable face cream that sits well under makeup and doesn't leave a film. Lavender to calm, jasmine for evenings, and Divine Floral — our house blend, and the one people come back for.
ingredients: Aqua, aloe vera, shea butter, jojoba oil, glycerin, hyaluronic acid, floral extract of the chosen variant, vitamin E. 100 gms.

name: Face Cream
description: The same cream in a 50g jar — a sensible way to find your scent before committing to the full size, and small enough for cabin baggage.
ingredients: Aqua, aloe vera, shea butter, jojoba oil, glycerin, hyaluronic acid, floral extract of the chosen variant, vitamin E. 50 gms.

name: Ubtan Face Pack
description: Our grandmother's ubtan, milled and jarred — gram flour, wild turmeric, sandalwood and rose petal, in powder form so it keeps without preservatives. Mix a spoon with rose water or milk, leave fifteen minutes, rinse. Chemical-free, vegan and cruelty-free.
ingredients: Gram flour (besan), wild turmeric (kasturi manjal), sandalwood powder, rose petal powder, multani mitti. Powder form, 100 gms.

name: Shampoo
description: Sulphate-free shampoo that actually lathers. Lavender to calm an itchy scalp, rosemary to support growth and shine. Safe on coloured and chemically treated hair, and gentle enough for everyday washing.
ingredients: Aqua, mild plant-derived (sulphate-free) surfactants, aloe vera, glycerin, lavender or rosemary essential oil, panthenol, vitamin E. 200 ml.

name: Conditioner
description: A silicone-free conditioner — it detangles and softens without coating the hair in something you then need a harsh shampoo to strip off. Pair it with the matching shampoo.
ingredients: Aqua, cetearyl alcohol (plant-derived), shea butter, jojoba oil, glycerin, lavender or rosemary essential oil, vitamin E. Silicone-free. 200 ml.

name: Bath Salt
description: Epsom and mineral salts steeped with pure essential oil. Twenty minutes in a warm tub and the day genuinely dissolves. Suitable for both men and women — and a good one to keep for the evening after a long week.
ingredients: Epsom salt, sea salt or Himalayan pink salt, lavender essential oil, dried lavender buds, jojoba oil. Net wt. 50 gms.

name: Travel Kit
description: Everything you actually use, in cabin-friendly sizes, in a clear zip pouch: body lotion, body wash, face wash, shower gel and a soap bar. The one we sell most of in December — and the one people quietly keep for themselves.
ingredients: Contains five travel minis — 50ml body lotion, 50ml body wash, 50ml face wash, 50ml shower gel and one artisan soap bar. Scents vary by kit.
